g.text: AUDIT LOG ARCHITECTURE: separate pipeline, separate store, separate access control

text.tspan: ATOMIC with the business write (via outbox) so they cannot diverge
guarantees audit event IS emitted whenever the action succeeds
reads outbox u2192 publishes to audit pipeline
ALL audit events from ALL services
Options: WORM S3, Azure Immutable Blob, Postgres with revoked DELETE,
dedicated SIEM (Splunk, Sumo Logic, Datadog Cloud SIEM,
Hash chain or signed records for tamper evidence (similar to git)
Retention by policy: 7+ years for financial (SOX), 6+ for healthcare (HIPAA)
separate ACL: only auditors / security read
no engineer can edit or delete
often required to be SEPARATE from prod ops team
u2022 regulatory audits (SOC2, ISO27001, PCI, HIPAA, SOX, GDPR)
